title: Order Plus Vine Pressure
intendedTensionBeat: The player must choose between the lower water threat and a route vine is about to worsen.
intendedReleaseBeat: Saving the water-near puppy first while clipping vine creates the first real triage success.
expectedPath: Prioritize the lower/water-near puppy, clipping vine only when it protects the route.
expectedFailMode: Player tunnels on the vine-threatened upper side and loses the lower puppy or dock tempo.
designNotes: This is pressure, but it must remain readable. Avoid making vine feel like the main enemy.
